_meta.description: Fix catalogue for the PPD fix list generator. Rank 1 = AutoSegment. Used by fix-generator.js — sorted by score ascending, mapped by revenue impact descending.

fixes.plain_english_description: Three key customer groups — Gifting Intent, High Value Returning, and New Prospecting — are not yet defined as segments in Bloomreach Engagement. Without segments, Loomi cannot apply any personalised ranking rules. Creating these three segments is the single highest-impact action available.
steps: In Bloomreach Engagement, navigate to Segments
Create segment: Gifting Intent (4+ gift category page views OR gift product clicks in last 30 days)
Create segment: High Value Returning (2+ purchases AND AOV > £150)
Create segment: New Prospecting (0 purchases AND session_count = 1)
Link each segment to corresponding Discovery boost rule
fixes.impact_assumption: Based on Bloomreach benchmark data: moving from 14% → 68% AutoSegment coverage with active rules typically drives 12–18% RPV on targeted visitor cohort.

fixes.fix_title: Enable BRUID persistence for guest sessions
fixes.plain_english_description: Only 22% of site sessions are recognised by Bloomreach's BRUID cookie. The primary cause is that most visitors are not logged in when they arrive — they log in at checkout. Until BRUID persistence is implemented for anonymous sessions, Loomi cannot personalise for 78% of traffic.
steps: Verify _br_uid_2 cookie lifetime is set to 365 days in Discovery configuration
Confirm cookie is not blocked by consent management platform for returning visitors
Test BRUID persistence across sessions in staging environment
Monitor BRUID match rate in Discovery analytics weekly
fixes.impact_assumption: Based on Bloomreach benchmarks: 1 percentage point improvement in BRUID match rate ≈ 0.5–0.8% RPV lift. Moving from 22% → 70% match rate = ~24–38% improvement = estimated 8–15% RPV on returning visitor cohort.

fixes.plain_english_description: Three pre-configured boost rules exist in Discovery but are currently INACTIVE. Activating them will immediately surface the right products for each customer segment — gift products for Gifting Intent, premium and new arrivals for High Value Returning, and bestsellers for New Prospecting visitors.
steps: In Bloomreach Discovery merchandising UI, locate the three pre-created boost rules
Activate Rule 1: Gifting Intent — boost gift_eligible products
Activate Rule 2: High Value Returning — boost is_new_arrival and premium products
Activate Rule 3: New Prospecting — boost is_bestseller products
Monitor search result rankings for each persona in PLP
fixes.impact_assumption: Segment-scoped boost rules with confirmed segment coverage (post-fix 68%) typically drive 5–10% RPV improvement on affected search queries.
